title: German Date Tagine
description: A traditional German dessert inspired by the flavors of Morocco, featuring tender dates and a rich soft, Egyptian, and tagine-spiced mixture.
instructions: Dust a 25cm (10-inch) springform pan with flour.
Arrange the dates in the prepared pan.
In a bowl, mix together the cheese, tagine spice mix, and brown sugar.
Add the melted butter and almond extract (if using) to the cheese mixture. Stir until well combined.
Pour the cheese mixture over the dates in the pan.
Bake for 35-40 minutes or until the top is golden brown.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 10 minutes.
Let cool completely before refrigerating or freezing.
